item.title: Bi/Pan Mini-Dump
item.description:
As promised, here's the bisexual mini-dump I planned to do. Generally bi and pan mean the same thing, right? I'd say just use whichever one you feel more comfortable with, or whichever flag color scheme you like more. I'm no expert on the subject though, if someone would like to correct me. I identify with both a little, but a more specific label fits me better.
I do love this color scheme, and somehow it got even better.
I love this one so much. Leanbeefpatty and F1nn5ter for those who aren't aware. It was someone posting this image here on Imgur that got me to look into F1nn and following him taught me so much about myself and it's been life changing honestly. That, and his adorable chaotic energy is a lot of fun anyway. His Coming Out video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3reFDwM0yIA) where he comes out as Genderfluid (prefers he/him) and being on HRT, and being bisexual helped me so much. Inspired to come out of the closet a little more tonight, (am trans) but maybe not about the bisexuality, which if we get specific for me is probably fin(n)sexuality, lol.
I adore them so much. There's a "bisexual sitting meme" where bisexuals can't sit normally and I felt it so much, lol.
Maybe I need this.
I want this so much. "Equal opportunity sexiness" I believe?
I think someone made this because of the popularity of the reaction GIF. Surely there's another girl in Road to El Dorado for Chel to kiss though...?
I wonder if someone actually came out this way.
This was brought to my attention in one of my "Roommates Mini-Dumps", so ridiculously cute.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: Congrats Nanna!
item.description: I had quite the surprise on Facebook just now... Nanna Puckett made it on We Rate Dogs' account, and got a well deserved 14/10! Congrats Nanna and @MrPuckett !
item.dc:creator: JohnBluehill

item.title: This made me laugh…
item.description: Especially when it suddenly went! Edit: I like how the comments are firmly in one of two camps. The bring it on I want a go types, and the OMG you would never get me to do that types! It’s quite rare to find a comment that goes, maybe I might have a go? It’s always yay or nay nay. —-I expect the next comment will be a maybe one now. Don’t let me down ! Night all. Xxx
item.dc:creator: mercbrit

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Hey everyone it's MrPuckett here with TheFreePizzaDude! If you'd like to send food to an Imgurian going through a tough time, there are 2 easy ways on this post -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them, then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and one of the Angels will send the food for you!
If you'd like one of us to send the food for you - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 5pm central
Nanna is here to show you how it works for requests Check her out on WeRateDogs today!
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
13,643 meals since we started 827 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Pizza Tally 1235 1st and 2nd by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 1249 3rd by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 110 4th and 5th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 200 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by @OP 205 10th, 11th, 12th and 13th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 230 14th and 15th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 245 16th, 17th, 18th and 19th by @OP 315 20th by Pizza Angel @PuddleOfLoveJuices 330 21st by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 340 22nd by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 345 Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @StabbyTheCat 400 Kobe Bryant, 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 415 27th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 425 28th by Pizza Angel @RaysMusicExchange 445 29th, 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @MorganVPI 555 32nd and 33rd by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 600 34th, 35th, 36th and 37th by @OP ... Today's Grocery Tally 1228 1st by @OP 111 2nd by Grocery Angel @pot314 540 3rd by Grocery Angel @plantaindreams ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 37 meals Filled 3 huge grocery orders That's 13,680 meals since we started 833 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: If you are feeling down, here is a WHOLESOME Saturday dump to lift you up : )
item.description:
1. Watching the tutorials on YouTube
2. Oh good you're awake
3. Life with a duck roommate
4. Burpees
5
6. A very grumpy dog
7
8
9. Let's sign him to the team, he will learn to love it
11. Kiss my ass
12. Deeply releigous countries: "Women shouldn't have jobs, to emotional and all that. Just stay at home"
13
14
15. If this dump helped uplift your mood, please consider checking out my passion project - I'm working on a wacky game, inspired by The Stanley Parable, with lots of humor and wholesome moments. Please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for your kindness!

item.title: Images of Note: Dusty Chinchilla
item.description:
I mean Angels are fucking terrifying
"you can use AI" is such a fucking stupid selling point so yeah, go visit the titanic in a cybertruck.
Well.
C O C K S H U T E
All the chaos in the world is stored in the Muffin.
V I O L E N C E
This is why FOSS is more important than ever.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream m/w/f http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Got the job and I start soon!!!
item.description: I was let go a couple months ago and had since applied for hundreds of jobs... Initially I was so depressed being unemployed and worrying about not bringing in an income to help my family. One of the first jobs I applied for was just amazing. It was a long shot but I really wanted it so I thought I'd give it a try. If I don't apply, I don't even give them the option to say no, right? I kept applying to other jobs but eventually that first job got back to me and wanted to interview me. Grueling interviews, but I got through them all and I can't believe it. I got the job!!!!! Woohoo!!!!!!!!!!!!
item.dc:creator: Goldielocksbear
